name: Chocolate Raspberry Cheesecake2
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the crushed Oreos and melted margarine; press onto the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan.
2. In a large bowl, combine 3 packages cream cheese and sugar. Mix at medium speed on an electric mixer until well blended.
3. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition. Blend in sour cream and vanilla extract.
4. Pour the mixture over the crust.
5. In another bowl, combine the remaining package of cream cheese and melted chocolate. Mix at medium speed on an electric mixer until well blended.
6. Add the raspberry preserves; mix well.
7. Drop rounded measuring tablespoonfuls of the chocolate cream cheese batter over the plain cream cheese batter. Do not swirl.
8. Bake at 325°F for 1 hour and 20 minutes.
9. Loosen the cake from the rim of the pan; cool before removing the rim of the pan.
10. Melt the chocolate pieces with whipping cream over low heat, stirring until smooth. Spread over the cheesecake.
11. Chill. Garnish with additional whipped cream, raspberries, and fresh mint, if desired.
